title: Warpstack
body:
This mod is client-side only and **requires [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) to run!**

Warpstack adds [stack-based history](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stack_(abstract_data_type)) to the teleport command through a suite of four new commands:
- `/pushtp <destination>`: Teleport somewhere and push your _current_ position to the stack
- `/poptp`: Pop a position off the stack and teleport back to it
- `/lstp`: Dump the position stack to your terminal
- `/evaltp`: Execute a series of commands to manipulate or clear the stack

Most useful for server admins to teleport somewhere where assistance is needed and then easily warp back to where they were.
